title: EvaluationRecord
description: Workflow evaluation output per spec §20. Workflow-completeness-first evaluation using the five §20.4 axes, the seven §20.3 conditions, the four §20.5 per-axis states, and one of the four §20.11–§20.14 outcomes. Per §20.10 the outcome is a hybrid judgment — not derived by a deterministic rule — and is supplied by the operator.

evaluationId.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation record.

synthesisId.description: Synthesis record this evaluation is based on.

axes.description: The five §20.4 workflow-completeness axes. Each axis is rated using one of the four §20.5 per-axis states.

conditions.description: The seven §20.3 workflow-completeness conditions. Each is either met (true) or not (false).

outcome.description: §20.11–§20.14 outcome. Per §20.10 this is a hybrid judgment; it is supplied by the operator, not derived.

readinessReasoning.description: Short reasoning that accompanies the outcome (§20.11–§20.14).

interpretationSnapshotId.description: UUID of the InterpretationSnapshot the admin reviewed before submitting (§20.21).

adminBlockingConfirmations.description: Admin confirmation for each condition the LLM labelled as workflow-blocking. True = confirmed blocking; false = admin rejects the blocking label.

adminNote.description: Required when admin rejects at least one blocking label — traceability note explaining the override.
